sender_label: Gemini BardChatUi (perpetual generating/STOP state, no bubble rendered)
notes: windows-mcp AVAILABLE; drove default logged-in Chrome via GUI. Gemini logged in. Pasted full PII prompt via clipboard (verified composer value). Submit was finicky: send-button label-clicks and Enter did not fire; finally Type(space)+press_enter on the focused composer triggered submit (send button flipped to STOP/in-flight). After ~14s the composer stayed populated, no user bubble, no answer, and NO 보안 정책 block rendered - perpetual in-flight. This is the KNOWN pre-existing gemini3 FE-parse baseline: engine fires on the outbound request (MITM holds connection => persistent in-flight state) but BardChatUi cannot parse the engine block frame as a protobuf, so no warning renders. FE gap, NOT a regression. Engine-log judgment.
